text: In the side panel in graph view, changing the resoning is not being persisted

status.comment: Investigated. No 'reasoning' field exists in the schema. The GraphSidePanel allows editing: (1) connection explanation (click to edit inline), (2) aim intrinsic value/cost/loopWeight. Connection explanation updates appear to persist correctly via trpc.aim.update. Aim description field is read-only in GraphSidePanel (must use AimCreationModal to edit). Need clarification: Is the issue about (a) aim description not editable in graph view, (b) connection explanation not persisting, or (c) typo in aim text?
